text: Yesterday I explored the old town.
Last week we relaxed on the beach.
Two days ago I saw an amazing sunset.
Last year I went to Paris.
So, how was your trip? Where did you go?
It was amazing! I went to the coast. The journey was long, but the scenery was beautiful.
That sounds wonderful! What did you do there?
I explored the old town all day. It was exhausting, but I had a great time.
What was the best part? The highlight of the trip?
One evening I relaxed on the beach and saw a sunset. It was a memorable moment.

Welcome to our short travel review of the week. Many visitors shared their stories with us, and they were wonderful. One traveler said his journey was long but the scenery on the road was amazing. Another visitor walked along the beach at sunset and called it the highlight of her whole trip. A young couple explored the old town all day. They were exhausted at night, but they had a memorable time. Most people agreed on one thing. They relaxed, they tried new food, and they made unforgettable memories. We hope your trip was just as special.

Last month I took an amazing trip, and I still think about it every day. I arrived on a Monday, and the journey was long, but the scenery was beautiful. On the first day I explored the old streets and I walked for hours. I was exhausted at night, but I was happy. One evening I sat on the beach and watched the sunset. That was the highlight of the whole trip. I relaxed, I ate wonderful food, and I talked to friendly people. It was a memorable, unforgettable week, and I want to go back soon.

First, Roberto arrived in the city after a long journey. Then he explored the old town and walked for hours. Next, he relaxed on the beach and watched a beautiful sunset. After that, he tried wonderful local food at a small restaurant. Finally, he called the whole trip amazing, memorable, and unforgettable.
Last week we relaxed on the beach.
Two days ago I saw a beautiful sunset.
Last year we went to Paris.
The trip was amazing and memorable.
I explored the old town all day.
The journey was long, but the scenery was amazing.
One evening I saw an amazing sunset.
It was a memorable, amazing trip.
Last week I went to the beach.
